tagline: The Easiest Way to a Perfect, Protected, Pristine, Carefree Pool

hero.headline: 26 Years Keeping Long Island Pool-Perfect
hero.subheadline: Suffolk County's most trusted family-owned pool service. We handle every detail of your pool care so you can simply enjoy crystal-clear water all season long.
checkmarks: Full-season bundles — one price, zero hassle
2,000+ pools served across Long Island in 2024

services.headline: Complete Pool Care, Handled
services.subtitle: From opening day to closing, and every sparkling week in between — we cover it all.

cards.title: Full Season Service Bundles
cards.description: All-in-one maintenance packages with weekly visits, water balancing, openings, and closings for a completely hassle-free season.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Ongoing weekly care including skimming, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and equipment checks to keep your water crystal clear.

cards.title: Pool Liner Replacement
cards.description: Custom vinyl liner replacement with professional measurement and installation to give your pool a fresh, leak-free finish.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Expert repair and installation of variable-speed pumps, salt systems, automation controls, and heaters to keep everything running.

cards.title: Pool Openings & Closings
cards.description: Professional seasonal transitions — spring startup and fall winterization so your pool is protected year-round.

cards.title: Safety Pool Covers
cards.description: Custom-fit safety covers professionally measured and installed to protect your family and pool during the off-season.

steps.title: Book Online or Call
steps.description: Schedule your free assessment in minutes. We'll evaluate your pool's condition and recommend the right service plan.

steps.title: We Handle Everything
steps.description: Our experienced technicians manage your pool's chemistry, equipment, cleaning, and seasonal transitions — all on schedule.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal-Clear Water
steps.description: Relax knowing your pool is always swim-ready. No guesswork, no chemicals to buy, no stress — just pure enjoyment.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 1999
about.headline: Three Generations of Pool Expertise on Long Island
about.description: Founded in 1999 by Paul Romanelli, our company is now led by his son Rocco as Co-Owner and General Manager. With over 26 years serving Long Island homeowners, we specialize in solving complex pool care problems through expertise in chemistry, equipment, and seasonal transitions. Having served over 2,000 pools in 2024 alone, we are one of Suffolk County's most established and trusted pool service providers.

features.title: Family-Owned & Operated 26+ Years
features.description: Founded by Paul Romanelli in 1999, now led by his son Rocco. We treat every pool like our own.

features.title: Deep Chemistry & Equipment Expertise
features.description: We solve complex pool problems others can't — from stubborn algae to failing equipment systems.

features.title: Serving All of Long Island
features.description: Suffolk County and Nassau County coverage with reliable, on-time service every single week.

pricing.headline: Simple, Transparent Pool Care Plans
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprise charges. Choose the service level that fits your pool and budget — we handle the rest.

guarantee.headline: Our Crystal-Clear Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool isn't sparkling after our visit, we'll come back and make it right — no questions asked. We've built our reputation over 26 years by standing behind every service call. Your satisfaction isn't just a promise; it's how we've earned 350+ five-star reviews from Long Island homeowners like you.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve on Long Island?
faqs.answer: We serve homeowners throughout Suffolk County and Nassau County, covering all of Long Island, NY. From Bohemia to the East End and everywhere in between.

faqs.question: What's included in your full-season service bundle?
faqs.answer: Our full-season bundles include weekly maintenance visits, chemical balancing, spring pool opening, fall closing, and equipment checks — everything you need for a hassle-free season at one predictable price.

faqs.question: How quickly can you get my pool open for summer?
faqs.answer: We typically schedule pool openings within a few days of your request. Most pools are swim-ready within 24-48 hours after opening, depending on their winter condition.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home for service visits?
faqs.answer: No — most of our customers provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. You'll receive service reports so you always know the status of your pool.

faqs.question: How do I get started with your service?
faqs.answer: Simply call us at 631-472-6275 or book online. We'll schedule a free assessment of your pool, recommend the right service plan, and can often begin service within the same week.

testimonials.name: Mitchell Schwartz
testimonials.text: Opened my inground pool. Got it clear in 2 days. It looks better than it ever has. Highly recommend their service!

testimonials.name: Steven Krinsky
testimonials.text: Excellent service, On-time and Always returns your phone calls! Very reliable and knowledgeable team.

testimonials.name: Mike Hickey
testimonials.text: Very professional pool maintenance company. They take great care of our pool every week.

contact.headline: Ready for a Carefree Pool Season?
contact.subtitle: Get your free pool assessment and discover how easy pool ownership can be with Long Island's most trusted team.
benefits: Flexible scheduling — online or by phone
